nl_query: Show all scripts where the legal hold was approved by the COE Office.
failed_sql: SELECT sh.id, sh.case_id, sh.hold_reason, au_applied.display_name AS placed_by, au_approved.display_name AS approved_by FROM script_hold sh JOIN app_user au_applied ON au_applied.id = sh.applied_by LEFT JOIN app_user au_approved ON au_approved.id = sh.approved_by WHERE sh.script_id = :script_id AND au_approved.display_name = 'COE Office'
error: Validation failed (semantic): SQL contains a tautology: 'sh.script_id = sh.script_id'. This indicates a logic error where a column is compared to itself instead of to a literal or a joined column. Please review the JOIN or WHERE conditions.
